about.title: About us
about.description: With years of professional experience and a trusted approach, FL2 has established the highest quality control standards, allowing us to complete projects of any complexity within deadlines. Our team is focused on the synthesis of innovative materials and high-tech approaches...

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Learn the details about the floor installation and finishing process.

q1.question: How long does it take for the floor to fully dry?
q1.answer: Drying time depends on the material type and environmental conditions. Typically, epoxy floors need 24-48 hours, while self-leveling floors require 3-7 days.

q2.question: Is it possible to lay new covering on an old floor?
q2.answer: Yes, in many cases it is possible to lay new covering on an old floor if the surface is level and solid. Our specialists will assess the condition on-site.

q3.question: Why is professional leveling necessary?
q3.answer: Professional leveling ensures an even surface, which is essential for the long life of the covering. Improper leveling causes cracks and premature wear.

q4.question: What are your warranty terms and service conditions?
q4.answer: We offer a 2-5 year warranty on completed work, depending on the material type. Any defects during the warranty period are fixed free of charge.
